name: libgdbm6t64
title: libgdbm6t64
description:
GNU dbm database routines (runtime version)
GNU dbm ('gdbm') is a library of database functions that use extendible
hashing and works similarly to the standard UNIX 'dbm' functions.
.
The basic use of 'gdbm' is to store key/data pairs in a data file, thus
providing a persistent version of the 'dictionary' Abstract Data Type
('hash' to perl programmers).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libgdbm6t64 because GNU dbm database routines (runtime version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libgdbm6t64 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libgdbm6t64 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libgdbm6t64 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
